author: makortel
body:
#### PR description:

I experienced again read errors like in https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/49215 with MiniAODSIM file and `RepeatingCachedRootSource`. The `RepeatingCachedRootSource` did not provide a way to disable prefetching, so this PR adds such an option. Given the problems I've experienced, we decided to make the default to disable the prefetching.

Resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/1985

#### PR validation:

With these changes I was able to use the MiniAODSIM file with `RepeathingCachedRootSource` in a private test.
title: Make prefetching configurable and default to disabled in RepeatingCachedRootSource
